subject: #1155 — per-loop USD cost budget (max_cost_usd) for sequential agent loops

new_migrations_detail: PostgreSQL: migrations/versions/0007_agent_loops_max_cost.py (ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS, fixed DDL)

supply_chain_summary.note: No new Python or Node dependencies. math (stdlib) is the only new import.

trend.note: Prior diff report (cso-diff-2026-06-27-918) covers a different surface (agent reports). No shared findings; first audit of the loops cost-budget surface. Clean.

assessment: No findings at or above the 8/10 daily confidence gate. The change is a contained, defensive cost-limiting feature on existing, properly-gated endpoints. New field is validated (gt=0), persisted via parameterized SQLAlchemy core insert, and read on an access-controlled path. Migration DDL is fixed (no interpolation). Cost accumulation defends against NaN/inf poisoning. inf passes gt=0 validation but is harmless (max_runs 1-100 remains the hard stop).
